financials.role: financial statement cross-check candidate; not valuation SSOT

overview.description: Broadcom Inc. designs, develops, and supplies various semiconductor devices and infrastructure software solutions internationally. The company operates in two segments: Semiconductor Solutions and Infrastructure Software. The company offers networking connectivity, such as custom silicon solutions, ethernet switching & routing, ethernet NIC controllers, physical layer devices, and fiber optic components; wireless device connectivity, including RF semiconductor devices, connectivity solutions, custom touch controllers, and inductive charging ASI...
overview.financialIntro: In fiscal year 2025, Broadcom's revenue was $63.89 billion, an increase of 23.87% compared to the previous year's $51.57 billion. Earnings were $23.13 billion, an increase of 292.30%.
overview.analystIntro: According to 48 analysts, the average rating for AVGO stock is "Strong Buy." The 12-month stock price target is $523.84, which is an increase of 38.25% from the latest price.

data.title: OpenAI and Broadcom Unveil Custom A.I. Chip Design
